fault_description: contributors optimize locally without knowing the global target
new teles proposed that contradict the vision go unchallenged
strategic intent requires translation overhead because no ground-truth vision exists
state inside a process; other agents reason about a different reality
agents acting on divergent ground truth without detection
state evaporates on restart, mission context with it
components depend on hidden side-effects; refactor becomes impossible
documentation describes an older reality than what runs
nodes accumulate unique tweaks; replication fails
Director provides low-level how-to because declaration doesn't drive
agent operates against a transition the spec doesn't know about
change in one area causes unexpected failure in another
everything too entangled to change
utils, "helpers", "managers" accumulating unrelated concerns
signal drowned in scaffolding; logic density collapses
architect cannot isolate root cause; system-wide halt
decision rationale lost in handovers
org spends more time explaining than executing
time-to-mastery increases as docs rot
agents invent plausible details to cover gaps
Director forced to act as eyes for the agent
agent output satisfies unit tests but fails reality tests
agents hallucinate state instead of perceiving it
org reacts to logs instead of feeling system pulse
actors copy-paste approved data across entities
one role's tooling gap blocks another's sovereign action
engineer manually sets dependencies the Hub should infer
approval doesn't propagate; human re-triggers downstream work
error isolated from logs; system continues on a broken branch
one failure crashes the orchestrator; all in-flight work lost
agent paused indefinitely on transient condition with no resume path
error surfaces but lacks the information to fix or retry
app-layer errors take weeks because the kernel bug was never found
symptoms addressed without audit of the failing layer
high abstractions built on unverified assumptions
Director loses confidence because Ground Truth was never formally sealed
org afraid to deploy because real-world impact is unknown
decisions on hunches instead of cycle-accurate data
system works in tests, collapses under real-world entropy
a race condition surfaces in prod that the tests didn't explore
the same operational drag recurs without surfacing
a failure teaches one session; the insight dies when the session ends
humans must recognize, diagnose, and propose every fix
failures accumulate without formal diagnosis backlog
cognitive agent doing deterministic work (counting, sorting, pattern-matching, schema-validation, repetitive transformation) that a function would perform in microseconds at zero token cost.
deterministic logic drifts into LLM prompts because the substrate doesn't expose a primitive for it; the workaround becomes permanent because no one refactors back.
workload becomes brittle to model-change, quota-limits, or tier-cost changes because it's doing too much per invocation.
genuinely cognitive work can't fit because administrative overhead consumed the context window; judgment quality degrades without the cause being visible.
architecture ignores marginal-token-cost as a design constraint; inefficient patterns proliferate unobserved.
operator parameters, routing rules, or schemas embedded in prompts where they should be explicit substrate configuration; changing behavior requires LLM-round execution instead of a config update.
prompts grow without explicit bounds; useful content displaced by administrative padding as conversations accumulate.
structured data rendered as prose; LLM pays decoding cost on every round for content that should have been a table.
conversation history, tool results, or state hydration grows monotonically; eventually fills the window regardless of information content.
state is dumped as prose narrative where a YAML/JSON projection would convey the same content in fewer tokens and enable faster comprehension.
high-signal content placed where LLM attention is weak; ceremonial content placed where attention is strong.
prompt efficiency is never measured, never optimized; token spend is unobserved and grows without bound.
context is compressed visually but not semantically (e.g. removing whitespace without removing information-free tokens); Virtual Tokens Saved metric goes untracked.
